caveats: history_since_1990: monthly/weekly series ingest from 1990 keyless; FRED's fredgraph.csv 504s on dense daily series over long windows, so keyless dailies (DFF, DGS2, DGS10, ECBDFR, DEXUSEU) ingest via a narrowing ladder (1990 -> 2018 -> 2023 start). Setting FRED_API_KEY restores full 1990+ daily history via the official API.
